- **`src/components/dashboard/EventsFeed.tsx`** — new `"use client"` component that:
  - Receives `initialEvents`, `timezone`, and `dateLabel` as props (no loading flash)
  - Subscribes to `supabase.channel('events')` for both `INSERT` (prepend) and `UPDATE` (update in place) events
  - Cleans up the channel on unmount
